---
title: 'Mai Thai (Haslet, TX) | A little hole in the wall Thai Food place you HAVE to try!'
date: '2015-05-19T19:23:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8958848349970364615'
blogger_filename: '/2015/05/mai-thai-haslet-tx-little-hole-in-wall.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Enjoy'
---

<div>
</div>
<div>
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/mai-thai-35fa55d4f274.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" closure_lm_712861="null" height="320" oua="true" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/mai-thai-a328c3092ba2.png" width="272" /></a></div>
<div>
</div>
<h3 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<div>
&nbsp; <br />
<h3>
</h3>
</div>
</h3>
<h3 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
Mai Thai (<a href="http://www.maithaihaslet.com/menu.html">Menu HERE</a>)</h3>
<h3 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
&nbsp;</h3>
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
201 FM 156 N Haslet, TX</h4>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">I'm always looking for good Thai Food. This was one I missed for too long, and I'm glad I finally came! </span><br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">If you are in downtown Haslet, with the train tracks to your back, city hall to your left and Mr. Jims to your rightâ€¦ This place is tucked away just next to Mr. Jims. It was a restaurant built into an old house. Easily miss-able, Iâ€™m sorry I didnâ€™t come sooner. </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none; font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<br />
<div style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none;">
Yelp: <a href="http://www.yelp.com/biz/mai-thai-haslet?hrid=kRzwvE9BwPa8Ci2gD4ZwBQ">HERE</a></div>
<div style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none;">
Urban Spoon: <a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/13/1590824/restaurant/Mai-Thai-Restaurant-Haslet">HERE</a></div>
<div style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none;">
<br /></div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none;">
<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/13/1590824/restaurant/Mai-Thai-Restaurant-Haslet"><img alt="Mai Thai Restaurant on Urbanspoon" src="/images/imported/www-urbanspoon-com/biglink-e925fb7cf865.gif" style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none; height: 146px; width: 200px;" /></a></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none; clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<h4 style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none; font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
&nbsp;</h4>
<h4 style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none; font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
&nbsp;</h4>
<h4 style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none; font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
Overview</h4>
<div style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none; font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<div style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Iâ€™ve lived in Sendera Ranch (Haslet) since this place opened (2010), and I half noticed it, but didnâ€™t give it a second thought. Which is silly, because I enjoy Thai Food. The parking is on the side and back. </span></div>
<div style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none;">
<br /></div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<div style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Then I met Linda at the Q.T. gas station, we started chatting about the area. She told me this was one of her favorite restaurants. I was like really? That little place? I didnâ€™t know it was still open. She told me I HAD to go.</span> 
<div style="border-bottom: medium none; border-left: medium none; border-right: medium none; border-top: medium none;">
<br /></div>
</div>
</div>
<br />
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">I walk up the front path into a seating room with a handful of tables. As I open the door I am wafted with the familiar smells of Thai Curryâ€¦ I feel at home before Iâ€™d taken my first step. </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">I was greeted by a friendly young lady, who was quite knowledgeable about this business and food. She was also VERY well trained in customer service skills </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><em>â€œSince this is your first time here, let me tell you about our menuâ€. </em></span></div>
</blockquote>
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Thatâ€™s something more people donâ€™t think to say. </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">They used to be called Mai Thai Sushi. They stopped serving Sushi (not enough demand), but they still serve amazing Thai Food. Unfortunately for them, the whited out â€œSushiâ€ on the sign does even less, from a Marketing perspective, to build brand trust. It also adds to the feeling that theyâ€™re closed. </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">I have a feeling if they got a Marketing person to come give them a facelift and image re-rebrand (mostly to the building) they would get MUCH more traffic, and the demand for Sushi would be back. It probably wouldnâ€™t take much, a new door, clean up the landscaping, new sign. A few visual cues as to where to park and where to enter. </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Anywayâ€¦ </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">My wife and I put in an order for our two favorites, threw in a random one, and the MUST HAVE Coconut Mango Rice. I forgot to grab the Thai Iced Tea on my way out with my To-Go order. Ooops. Sorry Honey. </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">When I got it home, we sat and opened everything. Turned on the latest Blacklist, and enjoyed the best Thai Iâ€™ve had in a long time. There was so much Curry Sauce left over, that I mixed some of it in my Tuna and made a Red Curry Tuna Sandwich for lunch the next day. </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Itâ€™s nice to know that there is another Thai place in Texas worth going to. I WILL be back. </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<div>
&nbsp; <br />
<h4>
</h4>
</div>
</h4>
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
Cost</h4>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><blockquote class="tr_bq">
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Pad Thai (Chicken, Beef, Pork or Combo) $8.95 </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><em>Thai rice noodles stir-fried w/ eggs, bean sprouts, onions, flavored with lime and crunchy peanuts. </em></span></div>
</blockquote>
</span></div>
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><blockquote class="tr_bq">
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Gaeng Dang (Red Curry) $9.95 </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><em>Coconut milk with bamboo slices, bell peppers, and basil leaves. </em></span></div>
</blockquote>
</span><span style="font-family: inherit;"><blockquote class="tr_bq">
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Pineapple Curry Fried Rice $8.95 </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><em>Choice of meat, stir fried w/ onions, carrots and cashews, tomatoes yellow and green onion. Seasoned with Thai yellow curry tossed with pineapple.&nbsp;</em></span></div>
</blockquote>
</span><em>&nbsp;</em><span style="font-family: inherit;"> 
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Coconut Rice Mango $4.95 </span></div>
</blockquote>
</span><br />
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Total around $37.00 (ish) after tax. That's not an eat every day price, but it's roughly on par with more Thai places, and each entre is a LOT of food.&nbsp;</span>&nbsp;</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
&nbsp;</h4>
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
&nbsp;</h4>
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
Kids</h4>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">I suppose it depends on your kids. </span><br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Currently, our kids wonâ€™t try Thai Foodâ€¦ but I suspect my youngest will (he enjoyed it when he was younger). If you are going to dine in, you may want to check out their menu so see if itâ€™s going to meet your kids needs before you go (or get them food before). </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
&nbsp;</h4>
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
&nbsp;</h4>
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
Tips to enjoy it better...</h4>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">It may look closed when you drive up. They could use a little updating to the faÃ§ade to make it more inviting. But itâ€™s worth parking on the side or in the back and walking in. </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">All entrees come without spice (for the weak of palate) and you can add spice to your liking to any dish. (Level 1-5). We went with a 2 to be safe, and this was just about right for us, it had heat, but not too much. </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">They also do delivery within five miles. So, if you live in Sendera Ranch or Haslet, the PARTY IS ON!</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
&nbsp;</h4>
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
&nbsp;</h4>
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
Final Thoughts</h4>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Sometimes you just have to try new places, even if they are a little off the beaten path. The â€œhole in the wallâ€ types are often some of the best food! This one is no exception. </span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
</div>
<div>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<b>Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br />
<h4>
<ul>
<li>New to the blog?&nbsp;<a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start HERE</a></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Click&nbsp;<a href="http://eepurl.com/OjOcn" target="_blank">HERE to Subscribe</a>&nbsp;by email.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
</h4>
<div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div>
<b>What is YOUR favorite thing about Texas? Comment Below!</b></div>
<div>
</div>
